PowerShell(cd "C:\\01 클로드코드\\40-10 GEO-AIO 콘텐츠\(41-4 AI Optimized Contents\)"; $env:NODE_ENV='production'; Get-Content .env.local | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '='\) { $name, $value = $_ -split '=', 2; [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\($name, $value, 'Process'\) } }; node scripts/run-indexing-schema.js)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.geo-aio.com/proposal/%EB%94%94%EC%A7%80%ED%84%B8%EC%8A%A4%EB%A7%88%EC%9D%BC%EC%B9%98%EA%B3%BC" -Headers @{"Cache-Control"="no-cache"} -UseBasicParsing; $html = $response.Content; if \($html -match '한국어\\s+\(\\d+\)\\s+·\\s+영어\\s+\(\\d+\)\\s+·\\s+중국어\\s+\(\\d+\)\\s+·\\s+일본어\\s+\(\\d+\)'\) { Write-Host "한국어 $\($matches[1]\) · 영어 $\($matches[2]\) · 중국어 $\($matches[3]\) · 일본어 $\($matches[4]\)" } else { Write-Host "패턴 찾지 못함" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.geo-aio.com/blog/category/%EC%B9%98%EB%A3%8C%EB%A9%8D%EB%A9%8D-%EB%8F%99%EB%AC%BC%EB%B3%91%EC%9B%90" -Headers @{"Cache-Control"="no-cache"} -UseBasicParsing; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 페이지 로드 성공" } else { Write-Host "❌ 상태: $\($response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.geo-aio.com/proposal" -UseBasicParsing; $content = $response.Content; if \($content -match 'href="/proposal/'\) { Write-Host "✅ Link href 발견" } else { Write-Host "❌ Link href 미발견" }; if \($content -match 'encodeURIComponent'\) { Write-Host "⚠️ encodeURIComponent가 href에 나타남 \(클라이언트 렌더링\)" } else { Write-Host "✅ 정상 렌더링" })
